rawContent.message: Content unchanged and no code modifications

html.note: HTML comparison returned new snapshot (first compare run after dev fix)

contentComparison.reason: Focus areas are CSS/HTML structural verifications — full checks run regardless of content comparison result

cssExists.detail: File contains '.event-hero .top-gradient { position: absolute; ... }' with the full gradient definition scoped to .event-hero

cssBundled.detail: webpack.config.js bundles all blocks/**/*.css into css/screen output. Grep confirmed rule at line 193 of public/css/screen.css with comment '/* EventHero gradient system - scoped to .event-hero to avoid conflict with Hero.css */'

heroClassRemoved.description: The 'hero' class is NOT present on any EventHero wrapper element
heroClassRemoved.detail: page_audit extra_selectors check for '.hero' returned found:false, count:0 across all 5 block instances. PHP uses theme_block_props('event-hero relative overflow-visible') — no 'hero' class included.

gradientRenders.description: Gradient renders correctly and EventHero is independent from Hero.css
gradientRenders.detail: '.top-gradient' div present in all 5 instances (found:true, count:1 each). Screenshots confirm vivid green-to-yellow gradient background renders across all breakpoints and all 3 browsers (chromium, firefox, webkit). CSS is scoped to .event-hero so no dependency on Hero.css.

resizeObserverJs.description: EventHero.js ResizeObserver is bundled and no JS errors detected
resizeObserverJs.detail: webpack.config.js bundles blocks/**/!(*index).js into js/screen. EventHero.js implements DOMContentLoaded + querySelectorAll('.event-hero .top-gradient') + ResizeObserver to cap max-height to nearest <main>. taktician_validate_block_rules common.NO_JS_ERRORS automated check passed.

noJsErrors.description: No JavaScript console errors during page load
noJsErrors.detail: Automated check common.NO_JS_ERRORS passed by validate_block_rules tool

blockRenders.description: Block renders correctly with all content across all 5 test variations
blockRenders.detail: All 5 instances render as <section> tags with .event-hero class. Each has .top-gradient and .event-hero-inner. h1 present in each. page returns HTTP 200, not empty, no overflow.

build.detail: Build passes, no TypeScript errors. Lint passes for EventHero-specific files. Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings on EventHero.tsx (lines 177) are pre-existing across multiple blocks and not introduced by this change.

registration.detail: block.json valid: apiVersion 3, name takt/event-hero, category takt-theme, attributes (anchor, showExcerpt) correctly typed. File references valid. No child blocks.

tsxPhpSync.detail: taktician_validate_all sync check passed. Note: root wrapper mismatch warning (TSX uses InspectorControls as root in editor, PHP uses <section>) is expected — TSX wraps with InspectorControls for the editor panel, the actual output element is the <section>. No $attributes extraction anti-pattern found. PHP has proper @var docblock.

cssIsolation.detail: EventHero.css is scoped with .event-hero .top-gradient selector. No dependency on Hero.css gradient rules. Both blocks can coexist without CSS conflicts.

renderedStructure.detail: 5 instances on test page, all inside takt/demo-container. Wrapper: <section class='wp-block-takt-event-hero event-hero relative overflow-visible'>. Contains .top-gradient div, .event-hero-inner div, h1 heading. No 'hero' class on wrapper.

accessibility.detail: Heading hierarchy valid (h1 used correctly for event title). Images use alt='' (role=presentation decorative background). No interactive elements requiring ARIA patterns. a11yPatterns: [] (no patterns to test). All common.HEADING_HIERARCHY, common.IMAGES_ALT checks passed.

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements in this block. ResizeObserver JS verified as bundled via webpack config and no JS errors detected.

markupDuplication.detail: No duplicated markup for responsive breakpoints. Single DOM structure with responsive Tailwind classes.

edgeCases.detail: Test page covers: DEFAULT (no excerpt), FULL CONTENT (all fields populated), SAME-DAY EVENT, LONG CONTENT edge case, NO EXTERNAL URL. All render without layout breakage.

specCompliance.detail: 5 block instances on test page, all inside demo-container wrappers. Variations cover the specified test cases from planning spec.

blockRules.detail: All 13 automated rule checks passed: RENDER_200, BLOCK_WRAPPER, NOT_EMPTY, NO_JS_ERRORS, NO_OVERFLOW, IMAGES_ALT, LINKS_HREF, HEADING_HIERARCHY, REDUCED_MOTION, NO_EMPTY_SRC, LAZY_LOAD, SRCSET, DIMENSIONS

manualCheckResults.common.RESPONSIVE_RENDER: PASS — Screenshots at 375/768/1024/1440px in all 3 browsers show clean layout. No layout breakage. Title scales appropriately, content stays within container, gradient covers full hero area.
manualCheckResults.static.HEADING_RENDER: PASS — h1 tag confirmed present in all 5 instances via page_audit. Text 'TEST: Event Hero' renders correctly.
manualCheckResults.static.BODY_RENDER: PASS — Demo container descriptions visible in screenshots. Event data (date/time, venue, cost) renders in lower group section.
manualCheckResults.static.CTA_BUTTONS: PASS — External URL button (btn-primary) conditionally renders. Variation 'NO EXTERNAL URL' confirms it only appears when _EventURL meta is set. page_audit shows btn-primary found:false for instances without external URL.
manualCheckResults.static.BACKGROUND: PASS — Green-to-yellow gradient background renders correctly in all breakpoints and browsers. Gradient is independent from Hero.css, scoped via .event-hero .top-gradient. Screenshots confirm vivid radial+linear gradient composition.
manualCheckResults.static.MEDIA_RENDER: PASS — No featured image set on test event post. Block renders gracefully without the masked background image layer (conditional: if $featured_img_id). CUSTOM-005 verified.
manualCheckResults.static.MOBILE_REORDER: PASS — No side-by-side layout; stacked single column throughout. No reorder needed.
manualCheckResults.image.ASPECT_RATIO: PASS — No featured image on test post; decorative background would use object-cover class preventing distortion.
manualCheckResults.image.FOCAL_POINT: N/A — No focal point picker in block.json or template.
manualCheckResults.CUSTOM-001: PASS — Same-day event variation present on test page. PHP uses wp_date() comparison to detect same-day and formats as 'Date | StartTime – EndTime' without repeating the date.
manualCheckResults.CUSTOM-002: PASS — External URL button confirmed conditional. page_audit btn-primary found:false on NO EXTERNAL URL variation. PHP uses: if ($external_url) conditional.
manualCheckResults.CUSTOM-003: PASS — Venue name is conditionally rendered: if ($venue_name) check in PHP. No venue shown when $venue_id is empty.
manualCheckResults.CUSTOM-004: PASS — PHP uses date_i18n() for locale-aware date/time output throughout the template.
manualCheckResults.CUSTOM-005: PASS — Test event has no featured image; block renders all 5 instances without featured image and layout remains stable.

visualObservations.375px: Mobile: Single-column hero with large bold h1 title. Gradient renders full-width with green-to-yellow radial blend. Demo container labels (DEFAULT - NO EXCERPT, FULL CONTENT, etc.) visible between instances. Content sits in left-aligned max-w-[700px] container. Footer renders correctly at bottom. No overflow or clipping.
visualObservations.768px: Tablet: Same stacked layout, hero sections taller with more padding. Title remains large and legible. Gradient gradient covers full width. Demo container descriptions wrap naturally. Footer collapses to tablet layout. No issues.
visualObservations.1024px: Laptop: Layout expands, padding increases via sm: breakpoint classes. Hero sections have more vertical breathing room. Title and content properly contained. Gradient visually prominent and correctly scoped to each instance.
visualObservations.1440px: Desktop: Full layout. 5 hero instances visible on full-page screenshot. Each with vivid gradient background. Consistent rendering across all instances. No 'hero' class visible anywhere. Footer at full desktop width. No horizontal overflow.

passedChecks: EventHero.css bundled into public/css/screen.css via webpack glob
EventHero.js bundled into public/js/screen.js via webpack glob
ResizeObserver implementation correct and scoped to .event-hero .top-gradient
No 'hero' class on EventHero wrapper (confirmed via page_audit on all 5 instances)
Gradient renders correctly in all 3 browsers at all 4 breakpoints
EventHero is fully independent from Hero.css gradient styles
PHP template uses theme_block_props with event-hero class only
All 13 automated QA rule checks passed
No horizontal overflow at any breakpoint
5 block instances on test page, all in demo-container wrappers
All custom checks (CUSTOM-001 through CUSTOM-005) pass
HTTP 200 response, block renders visible content
